title: Fireside Chat with EP Daniel Schott
titleLine: FIRESIDE CHAT WITH EP DANIEL SCHOTT—Live
blurb: A live fireside chat with Executive Producer Daniel Schott — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
message: Back to our regularly scheduled programming
_help: CONTROL FILE for the interdependent.tv live takeover. Set active:false to END the live and return the channel to the standing schedule (every viewer reverts within ~15s, no site redeploy). Change playbackId to REPOINT to a different Mux live stream. Deploy just this file with: wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
